texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: LEISURE RATE CONTRACT 2025
texts.text: LEISURE RATE CONTRACT 2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This CONTRACT is made and entered by and between the Acacia Premier Hotel Kisumu , hereinafter referred to as the HOTEL and the Travel Agent hereinafter referred to as the CUSTOMER.
texts.text: This CONTRACT is made and entered by and between the Acacia Premier Hotel Kisumu , hereinafter referred to as the HOTEL and the Travel Agent hereinafter referred to as the CUSTOMER.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 1 GENERAL
texts.text: Article 1 GENERAL

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The HOTEL hereby agrees to lodge the CUSTOMER'S, guests at special or discounted rates (hereinafter referred to as LEISURE RATES ) and the CUSTOMER hereby accepts the HOTEL'S offer for lodging its employees or guests traveling to Kisumu for leisure travel in any one of the rooms described herein and agrees to book such employees or guests their stay at the HOTEL'S rooms.
texts.text: The HOTEL hereby agrees to lodge the CUSTOMER'S, guests at special or discounted rates (hereinafter referred to as LEISURE RATES ) and the CUSTOMER hereby accepts the HOTEL'S offer for lodging its employees or guests traveling to Kisumu for leisure travel in any one of the rooms described herein and agrees to book such employees or guests their stay at the HOTEL'S rooms.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 2 DURATION OF THE AGREEMENT
texts.text: Article 2 DURATION OF THE AGREEMENT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The present CONTRACT shall remain valid for a period commencing on 1 st January 2025 and ending on December 31, 2025 unless sooner terminated in accordance with the provisions stipulated below.  It shall not be automatically extended and is to be re-negotiated in December 2025, for the following year.
texts.text: The present CONTRACT shall remain valid for a period commencing on 1 st January 2025 and ending on December 31, 2025 unless sooner terminated in accordance with the provisions stipulated below.  It shall not be automatically extended and is to be re-negotiated in December 2025, for the following year.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 3 TYPES OF ROOMS AND RATES
texts.text: Article 3 TYPES OF ROOMS AND RATES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 3.1 Subject to availability, the types of rooms where the HOTEL shall  accommodate the CUSTOMER'S employees or guests and the applicable daily rental charges per room shall be as follows:
texts.text: 3.1 Subject to availability, the types of rooms where the HOTEL shall  accommodate the CUSTOMER'S employees or guests and the applicable daily rental charges per room shall be as follows:

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Note:
texts.text: Note:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  The above rates are inclusive of breakfast and Internet
texts.text:  The above rates are inclusive of breakfast and Internet

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Half Board Rate - A supplement of Kshs 3,000 or USD 30 per person will be charged on the Bed & Breakfast rate.
texts.text:  Half Board Rate - A supplement of Kshs 3,000 or USD 30 per person will be charged on the Bed & Breakfast rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Full Board Rate - A supplement of Kshs 6,000 or USD 60 per person will be charged on the Bed & Breakfast rate.
texts.text:  Full Board Rate - A supplement of Kshs 6,000 or USD 60 per person will be charged on the Bed & Breakfast rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  For every 15 rooms booked as a group, the hotel will offer one single standard room on Bed & Breakfast, on complimentary basis.
texts.text:  For every 15 rooms booked as a group, the hotel will offer one single standard room on Bed & Breakfast, on complimentary basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Children 0 to 4 years sharing Parents room up to a maximum of (1child) will be free.
texts.text:  Children 0 to 4 years sharing Parents room up to a maximum of (1child) will be free.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Children 5 to 12 years sharing own room up to a maximum of (2 children) will be charged 75% of the Double room rack rate.
texts.text:  Children 5 to 12 years sharing own room up to a maximum of (2 children) will be charged 75% of the Double room rack rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Children 5-12 years sharing Parents room up to a maximum of (1child) will be charged a supplement of Kshs 4,000 or USD 40.
texts.text:  Children 5-12 years sharing Parents room up to a maximum of (1child) will be charged a supplement of Kshs 4,000 or USD 40.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.2 The daily rental rates quoted under sub-article 3.1 above shall remain confidential and includes 7% service charge, 2% Levies and 16% Tax applicable to them by law.
texts.text: 3.2 The daily rental rates quoted under sub-article 3.1 above shall remain confidential and includes 7% service charge, 2% Levies and 16% Tax applicable to them by law.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.3 Rates are net and non-commissionable. It is for leisure travel only up to 15 rooms per night and confirmed upon availability.
texts.text: 3.3 Rates are net and non-commissionable. It is for leisure travel only up to 15 rooms per night and confirmed upon availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.4 The above rates shall include free access to all the Health Club Facilities of the HOTEL except the spa.
texts.text: 3.4 The above rates shall include free access to all the Health Club Facilities of the HOTEL except the spa.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.5 Access to the Health Club Facilities shall entitle the guest to make free use of swimming pool and gymnasium.
texts.text: 3.5 Access to the Health Club Facilities shall entitle the guest to make free use of swimming pool and gymnasium.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 4 REVISION AND ADJUSTMENT OF RENTAL CHARGES
texts.text: Article 4 REVISION AND ADJUSTMENT OF RENTAL CHARGES

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.1 The above Leisure RATES are based on the CUSTOMER achieving a minimum of 300 room nights in 2025 'Annual Room Night Production'.
texts.text: 4.1 The above Leisure RATES are based on the CUSTOMER achieving a minimum of 300 room nights in 2025 'Annual Room Night Production'.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.2 The above LEISURE RATES shall be subject to review on yearly basis.
texts.text: 4.2 The above LEISURE RATES shall be subject to review on yearly basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.3 The HOTEL reserves the right to adjust the room rates indicated above upon prior notice by giving advance notice to the CUSTOMER .
texts.text: 4.3 The HOTEL reserves the right to adjust the room rates indicated above upon prior notice by giving advance notice to the CUSTOMER .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 5 RESERVATIONS, CANCELLATION, CHECK IN AND CHECK OUT
texts.text: Article 5 RESERVATIONS, CANCELLATION, CHECK IN AND CHECK OUT

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.1 All reservations should be made directly through the HOTEL Reservation Department.
texts.text: 5.1 All reservations should be made directly through the HOTEL Reservation Department.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.2 The Reservation Department of the HOTEL can be contacted through the addresses indicated below:
texts.text: 5.2 The Reservation Department of the HOTEL can be contacted through the addresses indicated below:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: E-mail: reservations@acaciapremier.com
texts.text: E-mail: reservations@acaciapremier.com

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.3 The CUSTOMER or its guest may cancel its or his reservation subject to the following conditions:
texts.text: 5.3 The CUSTOMER or its guest may cancel its or his reservation subject to the following conditions:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. The HOTEL shall impose 100% charge of entire booking, if cancellation made two days before the date of arrival.
texts.text: The HOTEL shall impose 100% charge of entire booking, if cancellation made two days before the date of arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. The HOTEL shall impose 75% charge of entire booking, if cancellation made four days before the date of arrival.
texts.text: The HOTEL shall impose 75% charge of entire booking, if cancellation made four days before the date of arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. The HOTEL shall impose 25% charge of entire booking, if cancellation made seven days before the date of arrival.
texts.text: The HOTEL shall impose 25% charge of entire booking, if cancellation made seven days before the date of arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. The HOTEL shall waive charges for entire booking, if cancellation made Fourteen days before the date of arrival.
texts.text: The HOTEL shall waive charges for entire booking, if cancellation made Fourteen days before the date of arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. Rooming list to be provided Fourteen days before the arrival date.
texts.text: Rooming list to be provided Fourteen days before the arrival date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f. Advance payments for the booking needs to be made at the confirmation of the group.
texts.text: Advance payments for the booking needs to be made at the confirmation of the group.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: g. Any booking without advance payment or rooming list as per above will be cancelled from the hotel's booking system.
texts.text: Any booking without advance payment or rooming list as per above will be cancelled from the hotel's booking system.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.4 A guest shall be entitled to check in starting from 2:00p.m.local time and checkout 10:00 am on departure date.
texts.text: 5.4 A guest shall be entitled to check in starting from 2:00p.m.local time and checkout 10:00 am on departure date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.5 Subject to availability, the HOTEL may give a room for guests who want to check in early at an extra charge amounting to 50% of the room's rent for the first day.
texts.text: 5.5 Subject to availability, the HOTEL may give a room for guests who want to check in early at an extra charge amounting to 50% of the room's rent for the first day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.6 Rent shall be charged by the HOTEL for unused days in the event of an early check out.
texts.text: 5.6 Rent shall be charged by the HOTEL for unused days in the event of an early check out.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.7 Late check outs made between 12:00 noon and 6:00 P. M. on the day of departure shall entail a charge amounting to 60% of the room rack rate for one night.
texts.text: 5.7 Late check outs made between 12:00 noon and 6:00 P. M. on the day of departure shall entail a charge amounting to 60% of the room rack rate for one night.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.8 Late checkout made later than 06:00 P.M on the date of departure shall be charged 100% of the room charge of the previous night.
texts.text: 5.8 Late checkout made later than 06:00 P.M on the date of departure shall be charged 100% of the room charge of the previous night.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 6 SETTLEMENT OF CHARGES
texts.text: Article 6 SETTLEMENT OF CHARGES

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6.1 All guests must settle their bills prior to departure.
texts.text: 6.1 All guests must settle their bills prior to departure.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6.2 Credit agreement application needs to be completed and approved for monthly billing for Tours &Travel companies.
texts.text: 6.2 Credit agreement application needs to be completed and approved for monthly billing for Tours &Travel companies.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 7 TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: Article 7 TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.1 UNAVAILABILITY OF ROOMS
texts.text: 7.1 UNAVAILABILITY OF ROOMS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event where the HOTEL cannot accommodate a guest with confirmed reservation due to fortuitous circumstance or factors beyond its control, the HOTEL shall provide the following:
texts.text: In the event where the HOTEL cannot accommodate a guest with confirmed reservation due to fortuitous circumstance or factors beyond its control, the HOTEL shall provide the following:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Accommodation at a comparable hotel located as closely as possible for the first night of displacement;
texts.text: Accommodation at a comparable hotel located as closely as possible for the first night of displacement;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. One complimentary round trip ground transportation between the Hotel and the alternate hotel.
texts.text: One complimentary round trip ground transportation between the Hotel and the alternate hotel.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. The HOTEL will make the necessary arrangements for forwarding the displaced guest's telephone messages and mail.
texts.text: The HOTEL will make the necessary arrangements for forwarding the displaced guest's telephone messages and mail.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. The CUSTOMER will receive credit for any guests displaced toward its Annual Room Night Production numbers for purposes of this agreement.
texts.text: The CUSTOMER will receive credit for any guests displaced toward its Annual Room Night Production numbers for purposes of this agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. The HOTEL shall have no further obligations under this Clause in the event where a room becomes available at the Hotel for the displaced guest but such guest elects not to return to the Hotel.
texts.text: The HOTEL shall have no further obligations under this Clause in the event where a room becomes available at the Hotel for the displaced guest but such guest elects not to return to the Hotel.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f. Subject to availability, the HOTEL shall provide upgraded accommodations to a displaced guest in the event of his return to the hotel.
texts.text: Subject to availability, the HOTEL shall provide upgraded accommodations to a displaced guest in the event of his return to the hotel.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.2   TAX AND OTHER CHANGES
texts.text: 7.2   TAX AND OTHER CHANGES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The HOTEL reserves the right to change the rates in the event of any changes in the applicable government taxes, fees or assessments as well as any changes in applicable labor or service charges or fees.
texts.text: The HOTEL reserves the right to change the rates in the event of any changes in the applicable government taxes, fees or assessments as well as any changes in applicable labor or service charges or fees.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.3 RATES APPLICABLE TO GROUP BOOKING
texts.text: 7.3 RATES APPLICABLE TO GROUP BOOKING

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates are applicable only to leisure bookings, subject to a maximum of 10 rooms per night. Conference and Group rates may vary based on the availability of rooms during the required period which shall be regulated by separate groups and conventions agreement.
texts.text: Rates are applicable only to leisure bookings, subject to a maximum of 10 rooms per night. Conference and Group rates may vary based on the availability of rooms during the required period which shall be regulated by separate groups and conventions agreement.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.4   CONFIDENTIALITY
texts.text: 7.4   CONFIDENTIALITY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. The CUSTOMER shall not disclose Confidential Information to any third party (except with respect to contractors or travel agents providing travel requiring them.
texts.text: The CUSTOMER shall not disclose Confidential Information to any third party (except with respect to contractors or travel agents providing travel requiring them.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. The HOTEL'S Confidential Information 'shall include its non-published, prospective and current service offerings and rates.
texts.text: The HOTEL'S Confidential Information 'shall include its non-published, prospective and current service offerings and rates.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.5 TERMINATION
texts.text: 7.5 TERMINATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Either party may terminate this CONTRACT for any reason by giving thirty (30) days' advance written notice to the other party.
texts.text: Either party may terminate this CONTRACT for any reason by giving thirty (30) days' advance written notice to the other party.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.6 GOVERNING LAW AND FORUM
texts.text: 7.6 GOVERNING LAW AND FORUM

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. The present CONTRACT shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the relevant laws of Kenya.
texts.text: The present CONTRACT shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the relevant laws of Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. Any dispute arising from or in connection with the present CONTRACT shall be submitted to a court of competent jurisdiction in Kenya.
texts.text: Any dispute arising from or in connection with the present CONTRACT shall be submitted to a court of competent jurisdiction in Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. A CUSTOMER enjoying diplomatic immunity hereby waivers its immunity in respect of the enforcement of the terms and conditions of the present CONTRACT .
texts.text: A CUSTOMER enjoying diplomatic immunity hereby waivers its immunity in respect of the enforcement of the terms and conditions of the present CONTRACT .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7.7 MISCELLANEOUS
texts.text: 7.7 MISCELLANEOUS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Except for an assignment to any parent corporation, subsidiary or successors-in-interest to either party (excluding competitors of the other party), neither party may assign any rights, duties, obligations or privileges under this Agreement without the written consent of the other party.
texts.text: Except for an assignment to any parent corporation, subsidiary or successors-in-interest to either party (excluding competitors of the other party), neither party may assign any rights, duties, obligations or privileges under this Agreement without the written consent of the other party.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. This CONTRACT constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties and supersedes any and all prior agreements or representations, whether oral or written, pertaining to the content hereof and may not be amended except by a written document signed by all parties.
texts.text: This CONTRACT constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties and supersedes any and all prior agreements or representations, whether oral or written, pertaining to the content hereof and may not be amended except by a written document signed by all parties.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. No modification, amendment, supplement to or waiver of this CONTRACT or any of its provisions shall be binding upon any Party unless made in writing and signed by all parties.
texts.text: No modification, amendment, supplement to or waiver of this CONTRACT or any of its provisions shall be binding upon any Party unless made in writing and signed by all parties.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. The Parties agree that for purposes of this Agreement and any amendment or modification thereto, or for any other notice or communication between the Parties, signatures sent or received by facsimile transmission will be considered as enforceable and valid as original signature by the party signing.
texts.text: The Parties agree that for purposes of this Agreement and any amendment or modification thereto, or for any other notice or communication between the Parties, signatures sent or received by facsimile transmission will be considered as enforceable and valid as original signature by the party signing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. For the avoidance of doubt, emails, including emails that bear an electronic 'signature block' identifying the sender, do not constitute signed writings for purposes of this Agreement.
texts.text: For the avoidance of doubt, emails, including emails that bear an electronic 'signature block' identifying the sender, do not constitute signed writings for purposes of this Agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f. The failure or delay of any party to this Agreement to enforce at any time any of the provisions of this Agreement, or to exercise any option which is hereby provided, or to require at any time performance of the provisions hereof, shall in no way be construed a waiver of, nor preclude the exercise of, any of the provisions of this Agreement.
texts.text: The failure or delay of any party to this Agreement to enforce at any time any of the provisions of this Agreement, or to exercise any option which is hereby provided, or to require at any time performance of the provisions hereof, shall in no way be construed a waiver of, nor preclude the exercise of, any of the provisions of this Agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: g. The undersigned expressly agree and warrant that they are authorized to sign and enter into this Agreement on behalf of the party for which they sign.
texts.text: The undersigned expressly agree and warrant that they are authorized to sign and enter into this Agreement on behalf of the party for which they sign.
